name: Nicotinamide riboside in obese insulin-resistant men
summary: A randomized placebo-controlled trial of 2 g/day nicotinamide riboside for 12 weeks in obese insulin-resistant men, focused on skeletal-muscle mitochondrial respiration, content, morphology, and NAD-metabolite endpoints.

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for NAD and Redox Restoration because they can show whether the intervention changes biomarkers, mechanistic endpoints, and safety in Middle-aged obese insulin-resistant men. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
